title: Review: full-project fourth-pass
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — no new findings in fourth pass. All previous issues have been resolved. The codebase is in good shape.
Confidence: 97% chance of no missed bug. At this point, remaining uncertainty is entirely in unintegration-tested backends (azure-kv, gcp-sm, bitwarden, doppler). All backends with live integration tests (aws-sm, aws-ssm, aws-kms, vault, pkcs11, local-signing) are verified correct. The review is complete — any further flags would be bikeshedding.
